hypothesis: Augmenting CompGen’s conditioning inputs with active-site motif, facet label, and the mean first-shell adsorbate–metal distance will increase the proportion of generated two-shell compositions whose DFT-relaxed adsorption energies fall within ±0.1 eV of the conditioned target compared to the original CompGen conditioned only on adsorbate identity, adsorption energy, and allowed element list.
